film.title: Sassy Pants
film.overview: Desperate to get out from under her overprotective mother, a home-schooled teen runs off to live with her dad, and forms a bond with his much-younger boyfriend.

dialogues.dialogue: 1, 2... What the f**k man?  Oh dude, could somebody please put the music back on?  Oh, your parents should be ashamed of themselves  raising a bunch of hot in the pants degenerates.  Do you know what they say about girls who play?
Well, life is full of disappointments,  it's better you start getting used to them now.  Shame on your, June Pruitt.  You apologize to your daughter.  For what?
Let's make a toast  to our working girl.  We are so proud of you.  Do you get a discount?  15%.
